statementOfTruth.heading: Statement of truth
statementOfTruth.hint: Please check all the details you have entered for accuracy.
statementOfTruth.contemptOption: I understand that proceedings for contempt of court may be brought against anyone who makes, or causes to be made, a false statement in a document verified by a statement of truth without an honest belief in its truth.
statementOfTruth.beliefOption: I believe that the facts stated in this defence form are true.
statementOfTruth.legalRepBeliefOption: The defendant believes that the facts stated in this defence form are true. I am authorised by the defendant to submit this statement.
